name: cde-applications
title: Application & Access Reach
description: CDE-authored — access by application, application type & data source over PDC-BIDB-EXT.

dataAccesses.name: AccessByApp
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT a.application_name AS app, SUM(f.access_count) AS acc FROM fact_entity_application f JOIN dim_application a ON f.application_key=a.application_key GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 12

dataAccesses.name: AccessByType
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(a.application_type,''),'unknown') AS atype, SUM(f.access_count) AS acc FROM fact_entity_application f JOIN dim_application a ON f.application_key=a.application_key GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: AccessBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, SUM(f.access_count) AS acc FROM fact_entity_application f JOIN dim_datasource d ON f.datasource_key=d.datasource_key GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC
